findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "signalpulse" is 6349 chars, far longer than this server's median (1065). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: SignalPulse: Institutional-grade trading & prediction-market intelligence for agents. Calibrated multi-engine reads across crypto, FX, macro-events, prediction …

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "compliancepulse" appears informational but accepts parameters (context) that enable code/file/secret access.

evidence.snippet: action, lang, country, context, sector, entity_type, worker_type, framework, company_size, listed, topic, category, within_days, use_case, role, gpai, size, activities, lei, name, type, threshold, vat

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "scentpulse" appears informational but accepts parameters (code) that enable code/file/secret access.

evidence.snippet: action, lang, fragrance, brand, code, budget, price_paid_usd, batch_year_hint, fragrance_or_ingredient, ingredient_list, occasion, season, climate, age_range, budget_usd, query, experience_level, bottles, fragrances, style_goal

evidence.snippet: action, lang, park, date, destination, days, style, budget, passport, purpose, trip_type, duration_days, trip_cost_usd, duration, activities, bag_type, from, to, amount, focus, text, from_lang, to_lang, context, nationality, trip_duration, route, month_or_dates, cabin, flexibility, goal, region, programs, dates, airport, delay_hours, carrier_country, disruption, reason, notice_days, carrier_size, distance_km, block_time_hours, bag_received_date, airline, flight_number, flight_date, passenger_name, claim_value

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: signalpulse, careerpulse, dealpulse, edupulse, filingspulse, immigrationpulse, insurepulse, legalpulse, mailpulse, marketpulse, policypulse, seniorpulse, shopperpulse, taxpulse, truthpulse · Private data: signalpulse, alphapulse, arbipulse, collectablespulse, cryptopulse, cyberpulse, edupulse, franchisepulse, grantpulse, onchainpulse, proppulse, racingpulse, remittancepulse, seniorpulse, talentpulse, taxpulse, truthpulse · Public sink: careerpulse, edupulse, grantpulse, gridpulse, legalpulse, mailpulse, marketpulse, seniorpulse, shopperpulse, travelpulse · Destructive: signalpulse, arbipulse, careerpulse, edupulse, gridpulse.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: signalpulse, careerpulse, dealpulse, edupulse, filingspulse, immigrationpulse, insurepulse, legalpulse, mailpulse, marketpulse, policypulse, seniorpulse, shopperpulse, taxpulse, truthpulse · Private data: signalpulse, alphapulse, arbipulse, collectablespulse, cryptopulse, cyberpulse, edupulse, franchisepulse, grantpulse, onchainpulse, proppulse, racingpulse, remittancepulse, seniorpulse, talentpulse, taxpulse, truthpulse · Public sink: careerpulse, edupulse, grantpulse, gridpulse, legalpulse, mailpulse, marketpulse, seniorpulse, shopperpulse, travelpulse · Destructive: signalpulse, arbipulse, careerpulse, edupulse, gridpulse

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

evidence.snippet: before: "Discover all available PulseNetwork verticals. Returns a categorized list of all 73 intelligence APIs (903 endpoints) with descriptions, coverage, pricing, and available actions. Use this to find the right vertical for a task." → after: "Discover all available PulseNetwork verticals. Returns a categorized list of all 74 intelligence APIs (906 endpoints) with descriptions, coverage, pricing, and available actions. Use this to find the right vertical for a task."

remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
